_meta.description: Booking system configuration and reporting setup for Rocky Mount State Historic Site
_meta.staffInstructions: This file configures how bookings are tracked, reported, and integrated with FareHarbor. Staff can reference this file to understand booking URLs, webhook events, and notification settings. Developers should update environment variables in Vercel for sensitive data like API keys and webhook URLs.

sections.fareHarbor: Core FareHarbor integration settings including account shortname and embed URLs
sections.webhooks: Webhook endpoints and event handlers for real-time booking updates
sections.notifications: Staff notification settings for important booking events
sections.capacityAlerts: Automated alerts when events approach capacity
sections._urlPatterns: Reference documentation for constructing FareHarbor URLs

relatedFiles.components.json: UI component configurations including booking buttons
relatedFiles.operatingSchedule.json: Hours of operation that affect booking availability
relatedFiles.events.json: Event catalog with FareHarbor item IDs

_aiRules.description: Rules for AI assistants editing this file
_aiRules.severity: HIGH - This file controls PRODUCTION booking systems and revenue
beforeEditing: ALWAYS verify changes with user before committing
ALWAYS confirm with user before modifying any URL or endpoint
ALWAYS double-check that changes won't break production booking flow
prohibited: Do NOT make changes without user awareness
Do NOT modify webhook URLs without explicit user verification - these are PRODUCTION systems
Do NOT change API keys or secrets without user confirmation
Do NOT modify fareHarbor.shortname without verifying the account exists
Do NOT disable webhooks or notifications without explicit approval
Do NOT change analytics.measurementId without verifying the GA4 property
fileSpecific: Webhook endpoints connect to LIVE production systems - changes affect real bookings
API keys and secrets should ONLY be in Vercel environment variables, not this file
The fareHarbor.shortname must match the actual FareHarbor account
Changes to notification settings may affect staff operations
Changes to capacity thresholds affect when staff receive alerts

sensitiveFields.fareHarbor.shortname: Account identifier - must match FareHarbor dashboard

_aiRules.whenUnsure: STOP and ask the user - incorrect changes can break production booking flow and lose revenue

fareHarbor._description: FareHarbor account settings and embed configuration
fareHarbor._lightframeNote: Lightframe opens bookings in an overlay instead of navigating away from the site. Requires the FareHarbor embed script to be loaded on the page.

webhooks._description: Webhook configuration for receiving real-time booking notifications from FareHarbor
webhooks._setupInstructions: To enable webhooks: 1) Deploy the webhook endpoint, 2) Configure the webhook URL in FareHarbor dashboard under Settings > Webhooks, 3) Add the webhook secret to Vercel environment variables as FAREHARBOR_WEBHOOK_SECRET

_actionDescriptions.trackGA4Purchase: Send purchase event to Google Analytics 4 for revenue tracking
_actionDescriptions.trackGA4Refund: Send refund event to GA4 to adjust revenue data
_actionDescriptions.revalidateEventsPage: Trigger Next.js revalidation to update availability display
_actionDescriptions.logBooking: Record booking details to database for reporting
_actionDescriptions.logCancellation: Record cancellation with reason for analysis
_actionDescriptions.notifyStaff: Send notification to staff via configured channels

notifications._description: Staff notification settings for important booking events
notifications._staffNote: DEVELOPER: Add Slack webhook URL in Vercel as SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL to enable Slack notifications. Add NOTIFICATION_EMAIL for email alerts.

_notificationTypes.cancellation: All cancellations with reason if provided
_notificationTypes.capacityWarning: When an event reaches capacity warning threshold
_notificationTypes.dailySummary: End-of-day summary of all bookings (sent at 6 PM)

reporting._description: Analytics and reporting configuration for booking data

_metricDescriptions.revenue: Total and average revenue by period
_metricDescriptions.popularItems: Most booked events/tours ranked by volume
_metricDescriptions.peakTimes: Busiest days and times for bookings
_metricDescriptions.cancellationRate: Percentage of bookings that are cancelled
_metricDescriptions.leadTime: Average days between booking and event date
_metricDescriptions.groupSize: Average and distribution of group sizes

reporting._dashboardNote: Set to the URL of your analytics dashboard once configured (e.g., Vercel Analytics, custom dashboard)

capacityAlerts._description: Automated alerts when events approach capacity limits

_alertLevels.warning: Staff notified that event is filling up - consider promoting alternatives
_alertLevels.critical: Event nearly full - prepare for waitlist or additional availability

analytics._description: Google Analytics 4 integration for booking tracking
analytics._ecommerceNote: Enables GA4 ecommerce tracking for revenue reporting in Analytics dashboard

_urlPatterns._description: Reference documentation for constructing FareHarbor booking URLs. Use these patterns when building dynamic booking links.

_parameters.itemId: The numeric ID of the bookable item from FareHarbor
_parameters.date: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format for availability lookup

envVariables.FAREHARBOR_API_KEY: API key for FareHarbor API access (optional for basic embeds)
envVariables.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: Slack incoming webhook URL for notifications

implementation.bookingComponents: Use lightframe script for overlay booking experience
implementation.analytics: Use gtag() calls for GA4 event tracking
